title: ⚡ Instant Launch Configuration!
message: Take control of your startup experience with our brand-new splash animation preferences.
points: 🚀 Bypassed Boot Delays: Disable the introductory splash screen logo inside your Profile Settings to access your passwords instantly.
🎬 Layout Preferences: Toggle the video intro back on or off anytime to customize your startup experience.
⚡ Seamless Authentication: Background routine enhancements ensure your vault data initializes smoothly without causing blank layout pops.
🛡️ Stability Fixes: Patched subtle system asset lifecycles to guarantee a safe, crash-free app session.

title: 📦 Offline Vault Backups!
message: Take total control of your data with our new zero-knowledge offline backup system.
points: 🔐 Offline Generation: Export your encrypted vault securely without relying on cloud networks.
🖼️ Media Included: Package all your custom logos and image attachments perfectly into a single backup file.
⚡ Easy Restoration: Switch devices seamlessly by importing your backup package with just one tap.
🛡️ Military-Grade: Backups are heavily encrypted with standard AES algorithms for maximum security.

title: 🕰️ Welcome to Memory Lane!
message: Take a journey through your vault's history with our stunning new timeline feature.
points: 📜 Memory Lane: View a beautiful, chronological history of your Passwords, Cards, and Secure Notes.
✨ Premium Design: Enjoy sleek glassmorphism cards, glowing nodes, and smooth staggered animations.
⚙️ Under the Hood: Optimized our secure database to track your item history seamlessly.
🔒 Locked in Security: Fully integrated with your existing biometric and master key protections.

title: 🚀 The Update Hub is Here!
message: We've completely revamped how you discover new features and updates.
points: 🔔 Smart Alerts: Get notified about new versions directly inside the app.
📖 Interactive Changelog: See exactly what's new the moment you update.
🤫 Mute Option: Not ready to update? Mute alerts until the next release.
⚡ Smooth UI: Added a beautiful blur backdrop and sleek animations.
